mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(wl.work_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS workDate, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS issueTitle, u.name AS workerName, wl.spent_minutes AS spentMinutes, wl.description AS description FROM work_logs wl JOIN issues i ON i.issue_code = wl.issue_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = wl.worker_code
wl.work_date >= TO_DATE(#{from}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
wl.work_date < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY wl.work_date DESC, wl.work_log_code DESC

SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.title AS issueTitle, p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM issues i JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code WHERE i.issue_code = #{issueCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_logs ( issue_code, work_date, worker_code, spent_minutes, description ) VALUES ( #{issueCode}, #{workDate}, #{workerCode}, #{spentMinutes}, #{description} )
